Update from 1.20.6 to 1.21

Update from 1.20.6 to 1.21

This patch updates games/minecraft-server to 1.21

Full changelog available on official website https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-java-edition-1-21

It works fine on 14.0-RELEASE and 14.1-RELEASE amd64.
